scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix src/renderer"      "tsc --watch -p tsconfig.json" "tsc-alias --watch -p tsconfig.json" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && cross-env NODE_ENV=development nodemon --watch dist/electron --ext js --exec electron ."
scripts.dev:host: concurrently "npm run dev:host --prefix src/renderer" "tsc --watch -p tsconfig.json" "tsc-alias --watch -p tsconfig.json" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && cross-env NODE_ENV=development nodemon --watch dist/electron --ext js --exec electron ."
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix src/renderer && tsc -p tsconfig.json && tsc-alias -p tsconfig.json
